content.full_text:
Assembly
California Legislature

Tom Bane
Chairman
Rules Committee

October 16, 1992

FPPC
Legal Division
428 J Street #800
Sacramento, CA 95814

Gentlemen:

Is it permissible to give away framed pictures and plaques to members of my staff and volunteers? These are items that have sentimental value, but are not marketable and have been hanging on the walls of my offices. May they be given away as mementos without placing a sales/gift value on them?

Sincerely,

TOM BANE

TB:mb
